_comment: Runnable (system-1) conformance spec for byo-ai-key, the standalone canonical form interface_conformance.py executes ({method,path,path_params,query,body,required}). INTERFACE_CONTRACT.md '## Conformance spec' REFERENCES this file (standalone convention; mirrors conformance/user-accounts.json + ai_recommendations.json; system-12). ONLY statically-checkable, environment-INDEPENDENT shapes are asserted; the 5 produced/unavailable key-resolution variants (a-e) depend on key/admin/shared-key state and are verified by FE/BE tests, NOT this tool. THE 5 STATES + THE PUT/DELETE CREDENTIAL MUTATIONS + THE AUTH-GATED POST /api/recommendation ARE INTENTIONALLY OMITTED FROM THIS ANONYMOUS SWEEP: the credential endpoints are auth-gated (anonymous => 403) and mutate state; the masked-hint READ requires a session cookie (bootstrap below); they are checked under the signed-in BE runtime proofs. Asserted here: (1) the rec status read shape carries the additive remaining_free_uses/free_uses_total as number|null (presence/type invariant; value env-dependent), (2) the export egress shape carries context/persona_prompt/glossary/egress_note and NO key field (AC-13 boundary). HARD negative invariant (enforced by tests, not by a positive field here): NO response ever carries a raw key/ciphertext field (AC-10). To exercise the key-status read manually with a session: signup via POST /api/auth/signup (fresh email) to get a cookie, then GET /api/auth/ai-key => { set:false, last4:null, storage_available:bool } on a fresh in-memory store. Uses SPY (fetch once first: curl http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ticker/SPY). Boot: npx nx serve api (uvicorn :8000).

endpoints._note: GET status carries the existing availability/gate/cap PLUS the additive remaining_free_uses/free_uses_total. Anonymous-readable status shape is environment-independent; the additive fields are number|null (presence+type invariant, value env-dependent on admin/shared-key state).

Export egress shape (AC-13). Carries context/persona_prompt/glossary/egress_note ONLY. The HARD negative (no key/identity field) is asserted by FE/BE tests; here the positive masked shape is what the static tool can check.
